title: Test with real scorecard - identify candidate score with feedback
description:
Find a suitable test score with adequate feedback data for running real optimization.

## Requirements for Test Score

- Has feedback data (≥30 items in last 90 days)
- Has room for improvement (AC1 < 0.90)
- Safe to modify (non-production or designated test score)
- RCA data should be meaningful

## Steps

1. Run scorecard-wide FeedbackAnalysis report on target scorecard
2. Review scores with:
   - Reasonable feedback volume
   - Alignment metrics showing improvement opportunity
   - Clear error patterns in confusion matrix
3. Document selected score and rationale
4. Verify score has champion version
5. Record baseline metrics for comparison

## Deliverable

Comment on this task with:
- Selected scorecard (by key or ID, not client name)
- Selected score (by key or ID)  
- Current AC1/accuracy metrics
- Feedback item count
- Brief rationale for selection
